suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a convention for shared helper functions that are duplicated across services (e.g., buildNotificationContext). Workers should extract common helpers to a shared module if they're used in more than one place.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: fix-hold-expiration-email review found buildNotificationContext defined identically in both bookings-mutations.service.ts and citizen-portal.service.ts. This pattern could proliferate.
